title: Getting Started with Kiro for Non-Technicals
summary: Kiro is an AI-powered development platform designed to enable non-technical users to write code and automate tasks. The tutorial covers account setup, interface navigation, agentic chat capabilities, and features like MCP servers, steering files, and customizable skills.
